name: ZDSimulator
short_description: ZDSimulator is a unique project of the real professional training apparatus for train driving schools, which is now available to any user as a railway simulator
detailed_description:
Welcome to ZDSimulator – a railway simulator created by professional train drivers and railway fans!

This is a relaunch of the legendary Ukrainian simulator ZDSimulator on Steam

The project was initially developed in 2007 as a simulator for training Ukrainian train drivers, but in the future, it quickly gained popularity among fans of railway simulators and was actively developed by the community

You are offered a unique opportunity to get acquainted with the real control of well-developed locomotives on real routes created by our team and other developers

You will feel like a train driver and will be able to try to drive both a heavy freight train and a high-speed passenger train in unique and interesting scenarios offered by our simulator

Drive through exact copies of real railway sections in free mode and multiplayer

Feel the emotions and go through the challenges from the real practice of train drivers

Game features:

- Simple and complex mode, suitable for both beginners and full immersion enthusiasts

- Realistic physics of locomotive and train control

- Detailed development of electrical circuits and locomotive devices

- Ability for the instructor to set various faults and emergencies

- More than 50 routes, which is more than 3000 km of real track profile and stations

- Network play capability

    - visibility of participants to each other

    - driving at a distance

    - dispatcher control of signals and movement

Made with love for the community by professional train drivers!

Sit in the ZDSimulator cab, learn the control system, and hit the road!

supported_languages: English, Russian, Ukrainian, French, Czech, German, Polish, Kazakh, Spanish - Spain, Japanese
